title: Develop harvesting and processing specifications to produce an olive oil
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop harvesting and processing specifications to produce an olive oil demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Specify the style and quality desired of the olive oil

pcs.text: Identify desired style of olive oil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify desired style of olive oil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify desired style of olive oil.

pcs.text: Identify desired quality of olive oil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify desired quality of olive oil?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify desired properties of the olive oil using standard industry terminology.

elements.title: Establish the appropriate time and conditions for harvesting

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule harvest so that fruit picked will produce desired quality, style and quantity of olive oil.

pcs.text: Evaluate range of harvest methods available and select the ones most likely to contribute to production of desired olive oil

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate range of harvest methods available and select the ones most likely to contribute to production of desired olive oil.

pcs.text: Obtain and brief harvesting personnel about harvest requirements and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and brief harvesting personnel about harvest requirements and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and brief harvesting personnel about harvest requirements and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Establish the appropriate time and conditions for harvesting

elements.title: Specify post-harvest handling and processing method

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify and document post-harvest handling and treatment for olive crop using standard industry terminology.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify and document packaging, storage and transport requirements for processed olive oil using standard industry terminology.
